vulnerabilities.description: Server fetches arbitrary URLs provided by user without restriction. Confirmed access to internal hosts (e.g., http://internal-service) and localhost services.
File scheme is allowed and server returns local file contents, confirming arbitrary file read.
Apache mod_status is accessible from localhost and retrievable via SSRF, leaking server version, MPM, and request details.
Server headers reveal Apache/2.4.54 (Debian) and X-Powered-By: PHP/7.4.33.
